tool.name: AutoGen
tool.description: Multi-agent framework from Microsoft now in maintenance mode after Agent Framework consolidation.
tool.statusNote: Maintenance mode. Microsoft merged AutoGen with Semantic Kernel into the Microsoft Agent Framework.
tool.logoNotes: Official AutoGen logo asset from the owner-controlled microsoft/autogen repo (`python/docs/src/_static/images/logo/logo.svg`).
tool.practitionerNote: Flexible for research-heavy agent patterns, though teams normally need to add stronger production discipline around orchestration and runtime governance.

dataResidency.detail: Self-hosted library; data residency is operator-controlled.

deployment.detail: pip-installed OSS framework; no Microsoft-managed hosting (maintenance mode).

auditLogging.detail: No built-in audit subsystem; operator implements logging.

soc2.detail: Self-hosted library; SOC 2 applies to the operator's infrastructure, not the package.

iso27001.detail: Self-hosted library; ISO 27001 applies to the operator's ISMS, not the package.

iso42001.detail: Self-hosted library; ISO 42001 applies to the deploying organisation.

euAiAct.detail: Developer component, not an AI system placed on the market; obligations rest with the deployer.

licenseRisk.detail: Code MIT (docs CC BY 4.0) — permissive, OSI-approved.
